name: Sweet & Sour Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outside leaves and wash the cabbage. Shred to measure 5 cups.
2. In a saucepan, heat 1/2 inch of water to boiling with salted water (1 1/2 teaspoons salt per cup of water). Add vinegar or lemon juice and return to boil.
3. Add the shredded cabbage, cover, and heat to boiling. Cook for about 5 minutes or until crisp-tender.
4. Drain the cabbage.
5. Fry bacon until crisp and drain. Reserve all but 1 tablespoon bacon drippings in a skillet.
6. Stir brown sugar and flour into the reserved drippings. Add water, vinegar, salt, pepper, and onion to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens (about 5 minutes).
7. Add the cooked bacon and sauce mixture to the cabbage. Stir together and heat through, if desired.
8. Garnish with additional bacon, if desired.
Serves: 6
